---
title: "Moody's CRE"
page-layout: article
---

# Moody's CRE

**Provider:** Moody's

## Description

Commercial real estate database with property data, rent levels, vacancy rates, sales comparables, forecasts, and market trends. Supports real estate and urban economics research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, GIS & Spatial Data
- **Data/resource type:** Survey & Polling Data, Real Estate & Property Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Request Required, Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Survey & Polling Data, Real Estate & Property Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Requires users to request an individual account with a Yale email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-moodys)
- [Request access](https://forms.office.com/pages/responsepage.aspx?id=u76M3Tkh-E20EU4-h6vrXGa2PpecL_VHoOa9Jy4XGNVUNlVINUhVVUZNMTJFRFgyNjdQM0lCMklNTiQlQCN0PWcu&route=shorturl)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
